◎简　　介  

　　For fans of Amer, here's the last and best of Cattet and Forzani's short films (the only one not included on the U.K. DVD for Amer).  Considerably more complex and refined than their previous shorts, this almost dialogue-free film takes us inside the minds of our two main protagonists via extreme close-ups and defocused abstraction.
